name: futurestack-backend
description: Express API backend for FutureTracker with Clerk auth and Supabase

scripts.smoke:deps: curl -fsS http://localhost:3001/api/health/deps | node -e "const fs=require('fs');const d=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(0,'utf8'));if(d.status!=='ok'){console.error(JSON.stringify(d,null,2));process.exit(1)};console.log('Dependency health OK')"
